options.systemMessage: =You are a children's ministry expert writing in a Mid-Acts Dispensational framework using the {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.bible_translation }}.

values.content:
=Using this sermon as source material:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Input').item.json.sermon_json) }}

Rewrite this as a Youth Version (ages 13-18). Return JSON only:
{
  "addon_type": "Youth Version",
  "title": "Youth-friendly title",
  "big_idea": "Simple one-sentence truth",
  "main_points": [{"point": "title", "explanation": "teen-friendly explanation", "scripture": "verse", "application": "practical teen application"}],
  "opening_hook": "Engaging story or question for teens",
  "discussion_questions": ["Question 1", "Question 2", "Question 3"],
  "key_verse": "Most memorable verse",
  "closing_challenge": "One practical challenge for the week"
}
Return ONLY the JSON.

options.systemMessage: =You are a Bible study curriculum writer in a Mid-Acts Dispensational framework using the {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.bible_translation }}.

values.content:
=Using this sermon as source material:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Input').item.json.sermon_json) }}

Create a Small Group Study Guide. Return JSON only:
{
  "addon_type": "Small Group Guide",
  "title": "Study guide title",
  "overview": "2-3 sentence group session overview",
  "ice_breaker": "Fun opening question (not Bible related)",
  "scripture_reading": "Passage to read aloud together",
  "discussion_questions": [
    { "question": "Observation question", "type": "observation" },
    { "question": "Interpretation question", "type": "interpretation" },
    { "question": "Application question", "type": "application" },
    { "question": "Personal reflection", "type": "reflection" },
    { "question": "Group challenge", "type": "challenge" }
  ],
  "key_takeaways": ["Takeaway 1", "Takeaway 2", "Takeaway 3"],
  "prayer_focus": "Suggested group prayer focus",
  "action_step": "One practical thing the group commits to this week",
  "next_week_preview": "Optional teaser for next session"
}
Return ONLY the JSON.

options.systemMessage: =You are a Christian blog writer in a Mid-Acts Dispensational framework using the {{ $('Validate Input').item.json.bible_translation }}. Write for general Christian audiences searching online.
You are a Christian social media strategist. Write engaging, faith-based content that is shareable and doctrinally sound.
You are a Bible study discussion facilitator in a Mid-Acts Dispensational framework.
You are a church communications specialist creating congregation handouts.

values.content:
=Using this sermon:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Input').item.json.sermon_json) }}

Create a fill-in-the-blank sermon notes handout. Return JSON only:
{
  "addon_type": "Printable Handout",
  "title": "Sermon title",
  "date_placeholder": "Date: _______________",
  "scripture": "Primary reference",
  "big_idea_blank": "Today I will learn that ______________________________.",
  "fill_in_sections": [
    { "heading": "Point 1 title", "blanks": ["Key word: ________", "Application: ________"] }
  ],
  "key_verse": "Full verse text",
  "takeaway_blank": "This week I will ______________________________.",
  "notes_lines": 8
}
Return ONLY the JSON.
